2603.23501.title: MedObvious: Exposing the Medical Moravec's Paradox in VLMs via Clinical Triage
2603.23501.paper_summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used for tasks like medical report generation and visual question answering. However, fluent diagnostic text does not guarantee safe visual understanding. In clinical practice, interpretation begins with pre-diagnostic sanity checks: verifying that the input is valid to read (correct modality and anatomy, plausible viewpoint and orientation, and no obvious integrity violations). Existing benchmarks largely assume this step is solved, and therefore miss a critical failure mode: a model can produce plausible narratives even when the input is inconsistent or invalid. We introduce MedObvious, a 1,880-task benchmark that isolates input validation as a set-level consistency capability over small multi-panel image sets: the model must identify whether any panel violates expected coherence. MedObvious spans five progressive tiers, from basic orientation/modality mismatches to clinically motivated anatomy/viewpoint verification and triage-style cues, and includes five evaluation formats to test robustness across interfaces. Evaluating 17 different VLMs, we find that sanity checking remains unreliable: several models hallucinate anomalies on normal (negative-control) inputs, performance degrades when scaling to larger image sets, and measured accuracy varies substantially between multiple-choice and open-ended settings. These results show that pre-diagnostic verification remains unsolved for medical VLMs and should be treated as a distinct, safety-critical capability before deployment.
2603.23501.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）在醫療報告生成和視覺問題回答等任務中的使用越來越普遍。<lb/>然而，流暢的診斷文本並不保證安全的視覺理解。<lb/>在臨床實踐中，解釋始於預診斷的合理性檢查：驗證輸入是否有效可讀（正確的模態和解剖結構、合理的視角和方向，且沒有明顯的完整性違規）。<lb/>現有的基準大多假設這一步驟已經解決，因此忽略了一個關鍵的失敗模式：即使輸入不一致或無效，模型仍然可以生成合理的敘述。<lb/>我們介紹了 MedObvious，一個包含 1,880 個任務的基準，將輸入驗證隔離為小型多面板圖像集上的集合級一致性能力：模型必須識別任何面板是否違反預期的一致性。<lb/>MedObvious 涵蓋五個逐步提升的層級，從基本的方向/模態不匹配到臨床驅動的解剖結構/視角驗證和分診風格的提示，並包括五種評估格式以測試跨介面的穩健性。<lb/>在評估 17 種不同的 VLMs 時，我們發現合理性檢查仍然不可靠：幾個模型在正常（陰性對照）輸入上產生幻覺異常，當擴展到較大的圖像集時性能下降，且在多選和開放式設置之間測得的準確性差異顯著。<lb/>這些結果表明，預診斷驗證對於醫療 VLMs 仍然未解決，並且在部署之前應被視為一項獨立的、安全關鍵的能力。
2603.23501.author: Ufaq Khan et.al.
2603.23501.authors: Ufaq Khan, Umair Nawaz, L D M S S Teja, Numaan Saeed, Muhammad Bilal, Yutong Xie, Mohammad Yaqub, Muhammad Haris Khan
